personal.name: Favour Oti
personal.title: SOFTWARE DEVELOPER
personal.bio: I build polished, user-focused web and mobile experiences — from travel platforms to EV marketplaces — with clean code and thoughtful design.
personal.aboutText: I'm a software developer pursuing my Master's in Software Engineering at Carleton University. I specialize in building performant, accessible web and mobile applications that solve real problems. With experience spanning travel tech, hospitality, EV platforms, and fintech, I bring a product-minded approach to every project. I care deeply about clean architecture, smooth interactions, and writing code that other developers enjoy working with.

experience.description: Developed and maintained responsive web applications for hospitality and travel clients. Built reusable component libraries, implemented booking flows, and optimized performance across multiple projects.
Built the cross-platform EV rental marketplace from the ground up. Integrated Google Maps for real-time vehicle tracking, implemented payment flows, and delivered both web and mobile interfaces.
Contributed to fintech dashboard interfaces, building data visualization components and ensuring responsive, accessible experiences across devices.

projects.title: Kinnect
projects.subtitle: African Travel Discovery
projects.description: A platform connecting travelers to authentic African experiences, featuring curated destinations, local guides, and seamless trip planning.

projects.title: Revibe
projects.subtitle: Hospitality Booking
projects.description: A modern booking platform for beach resorts and hospitality venues with real-time availability, analytics dashboards, and streamlined reservation management.

projects.title: JeGO
projects.subtitle: EV Rental Marketplace
projects.description: Cross-platform electric vehicle rental marketplace with real-time GPS tracking, payment integration, and both driver and rider interfaces.

projects.title: StreamIt
projects.subtitle: Movie Discovery
projects.description: A sleek movie discovery app powered by the TMDB API, featuring trending films, search functionality, and detailed movie information.

projects.title: Havara Beach House
projects.subtitle: Luxury Property Booking
projects.description: Premium property booking site for a luxury beach house, featuring image galleries, availability calendars, and integrated reservation system.

projects.title: Dr. Tolu
projects.subtitle: Professional Portfolio
projects.description: A clean, professional portfolio website showcasing medical expertise, publications, and patient resources with a focus on accessibility.
